## Alibaba Cloud OSS SDK for Python

## Installation
- **Install with pip**

Python SDK uses a common package management tool named `pip`. If pip is not installed, see the [pip user guide](https://pip.pypa.io/en/stable/installing/ "pip User Guide") to install pip.

```bash
# Install the alibabacloud_oss_sdk
pip install alibabacloud_oss_sdk
```

## Issues
[Opening an Issue](https://github.com/aliyun/alibabacloud-oss-sdk/issues/new), Issues not conforming to the guidelines may be closed immediately.

## Changelog
Detailed changes for each release are documented in the [release notes](./ChangeLog.md).

## References
* [Latest Release](https://github.com/aliyun/alibabacloud-oss-sdk/tree/master/python)
